# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createEdgeFunctions } from '@vercel/edge-functions';
import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';

const getConfig = (req: NextRequest) => {
    const config = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG; // Assume this is your edge config object
    
    let API_KEY = 'vercel_default_key_789', 
        DB_URL = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com'; 

    if (config) {
        const data = JSON.parse(Buffer.from(config, 'base64').toString('utf-8'));
        
        // Assuming that the config has properties API_KEY and DB_URL
        API_KEY = data.API_KEY || API_KEY; 
        DB_URL = data.DB_URL || DB_URL; 
    }
    
    return { API_KEY, DB_URL };
}

export default createEdgeFunctions(getConfig);
